# Extinction Behavior Services

> Behavioral intelligence that identifies threats before they escalate, reads environments others overlook, and provides the insight to act decisively.

## About

Extinction Behavior Services (ExBS) is a behavioral intelligence firm combining crisis negotiation, forensic evaluation, intelligence operations, and behavioral science. We provide behavioral threat assessment, human intelligence (HUMINT), applied behavioral analysis, and extortion/blackmail response services.

## Services

- [Human Intelligence (HUMINT)](/services#humint): Discrete intelligence gathering, high-risk personality profiling, fixation and grievance escalation pattern detection, undercover intelligence collection.
- [Behavioral Threat Assessment (BTAM)](/services#btam): Strategic threat assessment, violence prevention training, behavioral risk indicator detection, escalation intervention.
- [Applied Behavioral Analysis](/services#behavioral-analysis): Behavioral assessment, personality dynamics analysis, termination strategy, leadership training.
- [Extortion & Blackmail Response](/services#extortion): Threat verification, controlled communication management, evidence preservation, counter-leverage strategy.

## Contact

- Email: Info@ExtinctionServices.com
- Phone: (727) 721-1982
- Web: ExtinctionServices.com

## Location

Tampa Bay area, Florida. Services provided nationally and internationally.

## Differentiators

- Multidisciplinary: Security and psychology integrated
- Operational: Team has real-world operational experience
- Discrete: Source protection built into operations
- Preventive: Catches problems before they become incidents
- 72 hours average to identify fixation patterns
- 100% of incidents had observable behavioral precursors
